description: Geo-blocking policy. Blocks all login attempts from countries outside the approved geographic region. A financial institution operating in Canada and the Americas has no legitimate reason to allow logins from unrelated regions. Stolen credentials used from foreign countries are stopped before authentication begins.

_metadata.threat: Credential use by foreign attackers after dark web purchase
_metadata.mitre_tactic: Initial Access — T1078 Valid Accounts (from foreign IP)
_metadata.validated_with: What If tool — Germany IP 185.220.101.1 confirmed BLOCKED
